title: papaver corona-sancti-stephani
intro: Papaver corona-sancti-stephani, commonly known as the Crown of St. Stephen poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and inflammation. The health benefits of Papaver corona-sancti-stephani include its analgesic and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe pain and reduce the risk of infection. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
